# Fde Config Docs

The schema of the `.github/fde-config.yml` file in each target repository.

## Properties

### `dependencies`

Type: `array[object]`

A list of dependencies that are periodically synced into your repository via automated pull requests.

The items in this list can be any of the below types, based on the value of the `type` field:

* [`directory`](./dependencies/directory)
* [`pre-packaged-tool`](./dependencies/pre-packaged-tool)

## Examples

```yaml
dependencies:
- type: directory
  repo: fde-core
  path: infra/common/libs/core
- type: directory
  automerge: true
  repo: fde-core
  path: py/common/libs/models
- type: pre-packaged-tool
  name: openapi-sdk-gen
```
